summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 13 feature improvements/fixes for JSON Compare Tool. All features working correctly - PDF export, Share comparison with copy button, Help dialog, Reset confirmation, Dark mode visibility, History with Open/Delete buttons, Filter 'No data found' message. Fixed nested button warning in History panel and Share URL using localhost.
passed_tests: Backend: Root endpoint, Config endpoint, File upload (valid/invalid), File analysis, Tools extraction
Backend: File comparison with Excel generation, Excel download, Share creation, Get shared comparison, History endpoints
Frontend: Help dialog opens with usage instructions
Frontend: Header does NOT show 'max file size' text (removed from header, correctly in dropzone only)
Frontend: Reset shows confirmation state ('Confirm Reset?') after first click
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works, Copy button visible in dark mode
Frontend: File upload and comparison workflow
Frontend: Summary stats display (File 1/2 Tools, Same, Modified, Added, Removed)
Frontend: Filter tabs show 'No data found' when filter returns empty results
Frontend: History panel has Open and Delete buttons (not tools badge)
Frontend: History Delete shows confirmation on first click
Frontend: Share Comparison generates link with correct domain, Copy button works
Frontend: SharedView loads correctly with all comparison data
Frontend: PDF, HTML, Excel, Print export buttons present
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent warnings: Missing Description or aria-describedby for dialog accessibility - low priority cosmetic issue
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Fixed nested button in HistoryPanel (changed outer <button> to <div>)
/app/backend/.env - Added REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for correct share URL generation
seed_data_creation: Used existing test files at /tmp/test1.json and /tmp/test2.json
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 requested improvements are working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_json_compare.py cover upload, compare, share APIs. Share feature creates shareable links with 30-day expiry. History stores comparison results with Open/Delete actions. Dark mode and light mode both functional.

features_verified.pdf_export: Button present, triggers multi-page PDF generation with summary, comparison, differences, file1 tools, file2 tools
features_verified.share_comparison: Generates shareable link at /shared/:shareId, copy button works, shared link loads correct data with all tabs
features_verified.print_preview: Print button present, uses word-level highlighting in print styles
features_verified.google_sheets_guidance: Shows 'Copy to Google Sheets (Use Copy buttons above)' text
features_verified.dark_mode_history: History text visible in dark mode with colored stats (green/yellow/blue/red)
features_verified.dark_mode_copy_button: Copy button visible with proper styling in dark mode
features_verified.history_delete_confirmation: Delete shows 'Confirm?' on first click, deletes on second click
features_verified.help_dialog: HelpCircle icon in header opens dialog with usage instructions
features_verified.header_no_max_file_size: Header does NOT show max file size text - only shown in dropzone
features_verified.no_data_found_message: Filter tabs show 'No data found' with descriptive text when empty
features_verified.history_open_delete_buttons: History items have Open and Delete buttons instead of tools badge
features_verified.reset_confirmation: Reset button shows 'Confirm Reset?' state after first click, clears all data on second click
